- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
  - Project type: interactive web app game
  - Language: TypeScript
  - Frameworks: Next.js App Router, Tailwind CSS, Phaser 4
  - Target: desktop and mobile web

- [x] Scaffold the Project
  - Bootstrapped the app in the current directory using Next.js with `src/` and App Router

- [x] Customize the Project
  - Added a landing page, `/game` route, Phaser gameplay shell, and milestone content model

- [x] Install Required Extensions
  - No extensions were required by the setup information

- [x] Compile the Project
  - Installed dependencies and verified `npm run build` succeeds

- [x] Create and Run Task
  - Created and started a `dev` task using `npm run dev`

- [ ] Launch the Project
  - Wait for user confirmation before launching in debug mode

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
  - Updated `README.md` for the current app
  - Removed HTML comments from this file
